exercises.sentence: Todos los lunes, yo ___ al gimnasio para hacer ejercicio.
exercises.translation: Every Monday, I go to the gym to exercise.

exercises.sentence: Normalmente, yo ___ a la oficina en bicicleta.
exercises.translation: Normally, I go to the office by bike.

exercises.sentence: Cada verano, yo ___ de vacaciones a la playa con mi familia.
exercises.translation: Every summer, I go on vacation to the beach with my family.

exercises.sentence: Ayer, yo ___ al supermercado a comprar comida para la cena.
exercises.translation: Yesterday, I went to the supermarket to buy food for dinner.

exercises.sentence: La semana pasada, yo ___ a una entrevista de trabajo muy importante.
exercises.translation: Last week, I went to a very important job interview.

exercises.sentence: Hace dos años, yo ___ a España para visitar a mis abuelos.
exercises.translation: Two years ago, I went to Spain to visit my grandparents.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era pequeño, yo ___ al parque todos los días después de clases.
exercises.translation: When I was little, I used to go to the park every day after school.

exercises.sentence: Yo siempre ___ a ver a mi abuela los domingos por la tarde.
exercises.translation: I always used to go see my grandmother on Sunday afternoons.

exercises.sentence: Cada verano, yo ___ a un campamento de natación con mis amigos.
exercises.translation: Every summer, I used to go to a swimming camp with my friends.

exercises.sentence: Si tuviera más tiempo libre, yo ___ a aprender un nuevo idioma.
exercises.translation: If I had more free time, I would go learn a new language.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a la fiesta esta noche si no tuviera tanto trabajo pendiente.
exercises.translation: I would go to the party tonight if I didn't have so much pending work.

exercises.sentence: En tu situación, yo ___ a consultar con un abogado inmediatamente.
exercises.translation: In your situation, I would go consult with a lawyer immediately.

exercises.sentence: Mañana, yo ___ a la biblioteca para estudiar para mi examen.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow, I will go to the library to study for my exam.

exercises.sentence: Pronto, yo ___ a visitar a mis amigos que viven en otro país.
exercises.translation: Soon, I will go visit my friends who live in another country.

exercises.sentence: La próxima semana, yo ___ a la oficina de correos para enviar este paquete.
exercises.translation: Next week, I will go to the post office to send this package.
